seoTitle: Tambo Upper vs Tamboon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tambo Upper and Tamboon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tambo Upper vs Tamboon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tambo Upper and Tamboon.
heading: Tambo Upper vs Tamboon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tambo Upper, Victoria and Tamboon, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tambo Upper has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Tamboon (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tambo Upper or Tamboon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tambo Upper has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Tamboon scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tambo Upper scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Tamboon scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tambo Upper or Tamboon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tambo Upper has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
